About Me

I am a Computer Science and Engineering student driven by structural problem solving and efficient program engineering. With foundational expertise in software systems layout, object-oriented concepts, and relational databases, my technical philosophy centers around building stable, high-performance logic frameworks. My engineering toolkit focuses purely on strong runtime programming rules, rigorous algorithms design, and structural database principles optimized for clean architectures.

7.19CGPA

Object-Oriented Programming Data Structures & Algorithms DBMS Operating Systems Computer Networks

✦ The Other Side

Beyond the terminal and the IDE, I am a published novelist, a poet, and an open-mic host. My debut novel Shattered Shadows navigates love, deceit, and psychological transformation.

My poetry platform @syahi.alfaaz has earned over 10 million cumulative views. I am one of 5000 authors worldwide in a world-record anthology recognized by three international record bodies.

I organize and host open-mic events, manage a curated poetry platform, and study Vedic philosophy as a way of living with intention.

Projects

Things I've Built

Full-Stack Web Application
Shrimad Bhagavad Gita Portal
  • Built a full-stack spiritual learning platform featuring verse catalogs, multi-language translation, and a smart avatar rendering system.
  • Collaborated remotely with a developer from Nepal — designed and shipped the project end-to-end across time zones.
  • Responsive dashboard with reading history, verse filters, and a collapsible AI chat panel for interactive user experience.
  • Future upgrades planned: streaks/reminders, Sanskrit AI voice, and a comparative philosophy module.
HTMLCSSJavaScriptGit
↗ GitHub ↗ Live Demo
Machine Learning · Final Year Group Project
Heart Disease Prediction System
  • Performed EDA and feature engineering on the UCI Heart Disease Dataset — handled missing values, outliers, and feature scaling.
  • Built and benchmarked 5 ML models (KNN, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, SVM), achieving 81.97% accuracy with KNN.
  • Deployed a responsive web application enabling real-time predictions, risk factor analysis, and downloadable PDF reports.
  • Managed version control in a team; deployed on Streamlit Cloud for public access.
Machine LearningKNNRandom ForestSVMSQL

Literary World

Where words become worlds

Published Novel

Shattered Shadows

Love, Deceit and the Power of Transform

A gripping murder mystery and suspense novel — follow characters as they navigate a world where secrets run deep and danger lurks around every corner. Psychological depth, hidden motives, and unexpected alliances that keep you guessing until the shocking finale.

📖 ISBN: 978-81-967619-8-1 💰 MRP ₹200  ·  Publisher: Writer's Pocket

Featured

In the Spotlight

🎙️

Featured by Digital India Platform

I had the privilege of being featured by Sukoon Talks (Sukoon Bharat), a storytelling platform that celebrates inspiring individuals and their journeys. The platform recognized my journey as a poet and author, along with the commitment to storytelling, gaining three World Records and meaning creative expression.

View Reel on Instagram (English) ↗ View Reel on Instagram (Hindi) ↗
📖

Featured by JIS Group — Authoring "Shattered Shadows"

JIS Group recognized me for authoring my novel Shattered Shadows: Love, Deceit and the Power of Transform, celebrating it as an achievement for a B.Tech CSE student at Narula Institute of Technology.

View Post on LinkedIn ↗
Interests

📜 Art, History & Ideas

An explorer of ideas through books, journals, and history. I enjoy reading across genres, journaling my observations, researching the untold stories behind great paintings, ancient scriptures, historical monuments, and the cultural contexts that shaped them.

🕉️ Vedic Studies

My curiosity often leads me to India's vast philosophical and spiritual heritage—from the Vedas and Upanishads to lesser-known scriptures, epics, and traditional commentaries. I am drawn to the pursuit of self-knowledge, the dialogue between different schools of thought, and the timeless search for truth that extends far beyond ritual.
